analysis_original.hidden_answer: He sure loved the gritty aesthetic of the lower sectors. The first androids were built to serve, not to feel. My step into the bar caused several heads to turn. Cyborgs wear synthetic skin to pass as human beings. These neutral zones were the only places safe from the war. Light clothing fluttered in the wind of the high-altitude docks. Mechanics and engineers worked tirelessly on the starship engines. Most avoid the dark alleys where the bounty hunters lurk. High-tech security grids protected the corporate archives from theft. Digital cameras recorded every transaction in the megamarket. Shadows after the sunset provided cover for the illicit trade. But nightfall on this planet brings a deadly, freezing fog.
